overview: InvoiceFast is a fast, client-side invoice creator that lets you fill out billing details and instantly download a professional PDF invoice — no login required. Features live preview, theme color customization, and localStorage persistence for your company details.
features: Smart invoice form with dynamic line items and real-time totals
Live side-by-side PDF preview (toggle on mobile)
One-click PDF download optimized for A4 printing
Drag-and-drop company logo upload with thumbnail preview
Theme color customization for branded invoices
Automatic calculations: subtotal, tax, discount, grand total
localStorage persistence for sender company details
Form validation with required field highlighting
Ad banner placeholder spaces above and below the form
